jobs.name: weekly-security-audit
jobs.title: Weekly Security Audit
jobs.summary: Automated weekly security audit. Review code for vulnerabilities, check dependencies, and generate a security report.

jobs.name: daily-code-qa
jobs.title: Daily Code QA Review
jobs.summary: Daily quality assurance pass. Review recent changes, run regression analysis, and verify test coverage.

jobs.name: weekly-docs-sync
jobs.title: Weekly Documentation Sync
jobs.summary: Weekly documentation maintenance. Update changelog, verify README accuracy, and archive stale docs.
